diff: As operators of the Pattern Liquidity Layer, Pattern Dev Co. automatically inherits, and is subject to, the base class of operational requirements related to Total Risk Capital management defined in [A.2.2.9.1.1.3.2.1.2 - Primes' Total Risk Capital (TRC) Management](3af8a3a2-25e5-44b3-87a4-7df1f2712685). Modifications to the base operational logic automatically propagate to the Pattern Artifact.
